title: OpenFRP74 spell
description: Re-projection of the 5.1-srd spell node for the 1974 lineage. Typed fields carry extracted mechanics (unprotectable); description is original OpenFRP74 wording (CC-BY-4.0). Verbatim source text lives only in the local digitization intermediate; source.blocks + content hashes anchor provenance.

name.description: D-6-normalized name (typos fixed); names otherwise as printed per D-7.

name_raw.description: Printed form when it differs from name (e.g. 'Dispell Magic').

range_raw.description: As stated, period units (inches); null when the text states none.

duration_turns.description: Fixed duration in turns when the text gives one.

duration_dice.description: Dice expression when duration is rolled (e.g. '2d6').

duration_formula.description: Level-dependent formula when stated (e.g. '6 + caster level').

reversible.description: Text states the spell may be reversed.

counterpart_5_1srd.description: 5.1-srd descendant id. Equal to id for direct name-mates (shared-ID convention); the renamed descendant otherwise (e.g. spell-arcane-lock); null when 5.1 has no counterpart.

period_conventions.description: Convention notes: inches scale (underworld 1"=10 ft), turn scale, etc.
